name: desktop
description: Knot desktop recorder — screen capture, webcam overlay, chunked recording
author: Knot

scripts.package:dir: pnpm assert-release-env && pnpm build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win: pnpm assert-release-env && pnpm build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac: pnpm assert-release-env && pnpm build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:linux: pnpm assert-release-env && pnpm build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml
